MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Greer M. Smith, Esq. of LAW GALLERY 409-7123, for plaintiff Simon Kong moving for summary judgment
Felix Horacio Roiz appearing in propria persona and was assisted by his son Richard Roiz 305-2651, opposing the motion
* Richard Roiz was sworn to be his father's interpreter.
** A R G U E D and the Court denied PLAINTIFF SIMON KONG's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. The request for CCP 437c(h) continuance also denied and ordered the parties to go directly to trial. (DAG/301) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on reguarly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger. Greet M. Smith, Esq. appeared for Plaintiffs Felix H. Roiz; Flor De Maria Roiz; Richard Roiz; Horacio A. Roiz; Maria De Los Angeles Roiz and Marvin Roiz. Defendants Felix Horacio Roiz and Richard Roiz appeared in pro per. The Case did not settle and remains on the trial calendar.
